raw_text:
```json
{
  "distinct_claims": [
    "Dr. Tammy Ma is an experimental plasma physicist at the National Ignition Facility.",
    "The National Ignition Facility is the world’s largest, most energetic laser.",
    "Dr. Ma leads a number of fusion experiments at the National Ignition Facility.",
    "Dr. Ma heads the X-Ray Analysis Group for the Inertial Confinement Fusion program.",
    "Dr. Ma manages and directs a $7.5 million portfolio of fundamental and applied research activities.",
    "Dr. Ma's research activities emphasize recruiting, training, and mentoring top talent in new and emerging fields.",
    "Dr. Ma has authored or co-authored over 150 refereed journal publications.",
    "Dr. Ma has given over 75 presentations at international conferences.",
    "Dr. Ma received a Presidential Early Career Award for Science and Engineering in 2016.",
    "Dr. Ma received the Stix Award for Outstanding Early Career Contributions to Plasma Research in 2016.",
    "Dr. Ma received a DOE Early Career Research Award in 2018.",
    "Dr. Ma has been appointed as one of 40 early career scientists worldwide as a Young Scientist of the World Economic Forum.",
    "Dr. Ma is a member of the Fusion Energy Sciences Advisory Committee advising the Department of Energy’s Office of Science."
  ]
}
```
